$schema-note: Ratchet baseline for lint-unique-mutator.mjs (rawWriteCount) and lint-op-via-gateway.mjs (gatewayBaselineSetters). Each gate does a FULL-TREE scan of its violation class and asserts current <= recorded; if current is lower it AUTO-REWRITES this file downward (ratchet). Never edit by hand to raise a number -- that is exactly the debt the ratchet forbids. Arrays are sorted for deterministic diffs.
